title: First Russian shadow fleet vessel enters Channel since Smyrtos boarding
summary_full: Forwarder, a Russian-flagged ship which left port in Primorsk last week, entered the Channel on Wednesday evening.
summary_public: Forwarder, a Russian-flagged ship which left port in Primorsk last week, entered the Channel on Wednesday evening.
